overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city center at dusk. The player descends from an elevated walkway, explores a commercial street with massive digital billboards, and enters a multi-level plaza with a giant tree and neon outdoor seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway descending to city street

events.description: beginning descent from elevated walkway toward street level
reaching bottom of stairs and turning left onto the street

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs from an elevated position toward the street below, passing glowing bollards

notable_agents.action: standing near the yellow barrier looking out at the street

entered.detail: concrete barriers with glowing yellow arrow lights pointing left
tall building with purple neon trim and reflective glass windows
dark glass building with illuminated windows
tall white cylindrical lights lining the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the top of an elevated walkway looking down at a city street with glowing yellow chevron barriers. The player descends stairs flanked by modern glass towers with purple neon accents, reaching street level where pedestrians are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with massive digital advertising displays

events.description: entering the main commercial street with large digital billboards on the left
passing close to a large digital billboard structure temporarily blocking view of the sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past other pedestrians with massive digital displays on the left side

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera wearing a white cap and dark clothing

entered.detail: tall curved display showing changing advertisements with purple, green, and checkered neon patterns
modern building with large vertical columns and teal illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide city street lined with futuristic architecture, massive digital billboards display vibrant neon advertisements on the left while modern buildings with glowing accents line the right. The player passes pedestrians and approaches an open plaza area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level urban plaza with central tree and neon outdoor lounge

events.description: entering the open plaza from the street, revealing the large central tree
descending stairs to the lower plaza level around the tree trunk
looking up through the tree canopy at the sky and surrounding towers

agents.ego_description: walking down into the lower level of the plaza around a large central tree, observing the neon-lit seating area

entered.detail: massive mature tree with thick trunk and dense green canopy rising through the plaza
curved outdoor bar with glowing cyan and pink neon trim surrounding the tree base
outdoor seating areas with umbrellas and purple neon lighting
smaller tree with distinctive red foliage near the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious urban plaza dominated by a giant tree growing through the center. The player descends to a lower level featuring a circular neon-lit bar wrapped around the tree trunk with pink and cyan lighting. Looking up through the dense canopy reveals the blue sky and towering glass buildings above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking the plaza

events.description: ascending stairs back to the upper walkway level
returning to street-level walkway with digital billboards visible again

agents.ego_description: climbing back up to the upper walkway and continuing along the street with railings overlooking the plaza

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the elevated walkway toward the digital billboards

entered.detail: metal and glass railing overlooking the lower plaza level
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player ascends stairs back to the upper walkway level, leaving the neon bar below. From the elevated path with glass railings, the view overlooks the plaza while massive digital billboards and glass towers rise ahead. The giant tree now appears to the right as the camera continues forward along the urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated urban walkway down into a neon-lit plaza and back up to the city skyline. It begins by descending stairs flanked by glass towers with purple accents, moving past glowing yellow chevron barriers to reach a wide street level. As the camera advances, the environment expands into a corridor of futuristic architecture where massive digital billboards cast vibrant neon light across the path toward an open plaza. The scene then shifts downward into a multi-level space dominated by a giant tree, circling a neon-lit bar with pink and cyan lighting before looking up through the canopy at the towering buildings above. Finally, the camera ascends back to the upper walkway, leaving the plaza behind to overlook the urban corridor and the distant glow of the city's digital displays.
